_comment: Expected `next build` render mode for every route, asserted by scripts/assert-route-classification.mjs after a build. Guards the conversion-track payoff (3.0.4.8+3.0.4.9): a route must not silently regress to a more dynamic mode. Modes: 'static' = ○ (fully prerendered), 'partial' = ◐ (partial prerender — static shell + request-time <Suspense> holes), 'dynamic' = ƒ (server-rendered per request). New routes must be added here or the check fails. If a change is intentional, update this file in the same commit.

_reasons./: Transient auth_error query param renders in a Suspense dynamic hole; hero + tiles are static.
_reasons./sites: Client-state class/type filters (not searchParams) plus a searchParams-driven sort; the live-price overlay streams from a dynamic hole.
_reasons./sites/[id]: Per-site detail (params + DB + live prices) streams from a dynamic hole.
_reasons./admin: Per-user: the session-gated single-page dashboard (KPIs, status strip, traffic, users) is a request-time dynamic hole; visx charts are client-only islands inside it.
_reasons./admin/access: Per-user: session-gated admin-role management + audit is a request-time dynamic hole.
_reasons./admin/access/[userId]: Per-user: session-gated admin user detail (a user's linked characters + sessions; force-unlink / reassign / force-logout) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container prerenders.
_reasons./characters: Per-user: the session-gated character-management list (link / switch active / unlink) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell.
_reasons./industry: Industry dashboard — static shell of cached sample reads (favorites) plus the typed hint and recently-viewed (client/localStorage); the live Active-jobs section's session + linked-character read is a request-time dynamic hole (the /jobs precedent), and the personal job board + the header slot counts are fetched client-side from /api/account/industry-jobs and the corporation jobs from /api/account/corp-industry-jobs (both Neon stale-gated on-view reads; each job's live ready + countdown derives client-side from its absolute end_date).
_reasons./industry/[id]: Per-blueprint planner ([id] param + cached structure/prices) streams from a dynamic hole; page chrome is the static shell.
_reasons./dev/sparkline: Unlinked dev demo of the visx sparkline primitive — static shell, no request-time data; the chart is a client-only component loaded via dynamic(ssr:false).
_reasons./skills: Per-user: the session-gated linked-character read (names, portraits, scope health) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell, and the queue data itself is fetched client-side from /api/account/skills (a Neon stale-gated on-view read; the live countdown derives client-side from each entry's absolute finish_date) — no server render-time data.
_reasons./jobs: Per-user: the session-gated linked-character read (names, portraits, scope health) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell, and the personal job boards are fetched client-side from /api/account/industry-jobs and the corporation jobs from /api/account/corp-industry-jobs (both Neon stale-gated on-view reads; each job's live ready + countdown derives client-side from its absolute end_date) — no server render-time data.
_reasons./structures: Per-user: the session-gated structure builder (the saved custom-structures read + the cached SDE picker options) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell. The builder + saved list are a client island calling the /api/account/custom-structures CRUD.
_reasons./dev/sandbox: UX exploration sandbox index — admin-gated on production only; the request-time session read is a dynamic hole (so the container prerenders as a static shell), but the gate only redirects on production. Preview/dev stay open so the mockups are viewable where EVE login isn't available. Links to the gallery leaf pages.
_reasons./dev/esi: ESI scope-superset proving page (3.4.6) — production-only admin gate (the /dev/sandbox pattern): the unconditional session read + linked-character list is a request-time dynamic hole (container prerenders as the static shell); the per-endpoint read panel is a client island doing on-demand POSTs to /api/dev/esi (no polling, nothing stored).
_reasons./dev/sandbox/trees: Unlinked dev mockup gallery — static shell over a hardcoded sample build; the five tree-display variants are client-only islands.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/trees/flow: Unlinked dev flow-connector explorer — static shell; the interactive graph (blueprint switch, drill-zoom) is a client-only island over real (fixed-id) blueprint structures.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/industry: Unlinked dev mockup of the planner page (hero + hybrid build view) — static shell; structures are fixed-id cached reads, the hybrid graph is a client-only island.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/prices: Unlinked dev mockup gallery — static shell; the ten price-animation variants are client-only, driven by timers over a hardcoded sample figure.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/cards: Unlinked dev mockup gallery — static shell; the six card variants are client-only (hover/pointer effects) over hardcoded sample data.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/overlays: Unlinked Base UI overlay proving harness (OOB.2.1) — static shell; the four overlays (Tooltip/Popover/Dialog/Menu) are a client island (Portals/context). No PageShell, no DB/live reads.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/toast: Unlinked sonner toast harness (OOB.3.2) — static shell; the toasts are a client island driven through the shipped @/components/ui/toast seam + the ambient LoadingToastProvider (the <Toaster> now lives in the root layout). No PageShell, no DB/live reads.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/mapper: Unlinked dev mapper renderer spike (OOB.4.1) — static shell over hardcoded sample data; the React Flow node graph + dnd-kit reorder list are a client island. No PageShell, no DB/live reads.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/me-adjuster: Unlinked dev sandbox (3.7.5.4) — five visual/interaction patterns for a per-node material-efficiency adjuster (0–10), shown over a hand-authored mock build. Static shell; the variants are a client island driven by the real me-overrides helpers. No PageShell, no DB/live reads.
_reasons./dev/sandbox/node-card: Unlinked dev sandbox (3.7.5.7) — the build-plan node-card re-layout (inline ME/TE fields + QTY ring) over a hand-authored mock build, at two column widths. Static shell; the cards are a client island driven by the real NodeCard + me/te-overrides helpers. No PageShell, no DB/live reads.
_reasons./api/industry/blueprints: Blueprint search index is deploy-static SDE data (cached 'max', SDE-tag revalidated), so the handler prerenders to a static JSON asset — no per-request input.
_reasons./api/industry/systems: Build-system search index (systems with an industry-capable NPC station) is deploy-static SDE data (cached 'max', SDE-tag revalidated), so the handler prerenders to a static JSON asset — no per-request input. Filtered client-side by the build-location selector.
_reasons.dynamic /api/*: Route handlers — per-request by nature (auth, mutations, DB queries, crons, external calls). Justified dynamic.
